title: Renderjs
description: An mod that supports the modpack authors using KubeJS to draw HUDs and register ItemDecorator(item extra render in inventory), as well as a mod for rendering blocks and items in the world.
body:
An mod that supports the modpack authors using KubeJS to draw HUDs and register ItemDecorator(item extra render in inventory), as well as a mod for rendering blocks and items in the world.

Use events to add renders.

may have some bugs,but i will fix it :<

Gitee :[Home - Wiki - Gitee.com](https://gitee.com/ch3388508783/render-js)

GitHub:[RenderJS](https://github.com/ch1335/RenderJS)

注意:不同版本之间的方法可能会有变化,具体变化可以前往Gitee查看

Attention: Methods may vary between different versions, and specific changes can be viewed on Gitee

Version 1.21 will be updated soon
